examples: We do not have an ecological crisis. the ecosphere has a human crisis.
The economic sphere is the base, the ecosphere is the guarantee and the community sphere is the soul.
Currently, China's financial ecosphere has systematic defaults and can not meet the need of modern financial development.
Do you really think all these machines have no impact on this planet's resilient but still fragile ecosphere?
This is an interesting paper in Nature on the uncertainty we have about the future of the environment and ecosphere.
